title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Senior Vice President, Engineering

Michał runs SmartRecruiters’ engineering function and is responsible for software development, infrastructure, and security.

Michał spent the last 15 years building distributed systems and managing engineering teams in various industries. He joined SmartRecruiter in 2012 as one of the first employees and helped scale the platform to support the needs of some of the largest enterprises in the world.

He is passionate about creating engineering organizations where teams are empowered to deliver business outcomes.

Michal has a Master’s in Computer Science from Jagiellonian University.

##### Rebecca Carr

##### Thomas DiDesidero

##### Robert Symons

Executive Vice President, Partnerships and Development

##### Steve Hardy

Senior Vice President, People

Senior Vice President, Engineering

Senior Vice President, Product

##### Alison Bosch

Senior Vice President, Operations and Chief of Staff

# Michał Nowak

## Senior VP, Technik

Michał leitet die technische Abteilung von SmartRecruiters und ist verantwortlich für Softwareentwicklung, Infrastruktur und Sicherheit.

Michał hat die letzten 15 Jahre damit verbracht, verteilte Systeme aufzubauen und Ingenieurteams in verschiedenen Branchen zu leiten. Er kam 2012 als einer der ersten Mitarbeiter zu SmartRecruiter und half bei der Skalierung der Plattform, um die Anforderungen einiger der größten Unternehmen der Welt zu erfüllen.

Seine Leidenschaft ist es, technische Organisationen zu schaffen, in denen Teams befähigt werden, Geschäftsergebnisse zu erzielen.

Michal hat einen Master-Abschluss in Informatik von der Jagiellonen-Universität.

title: Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters
text:
Michał Nowak | SmartRecruiters

# Michał Nowak

## Premier vice-président, Ingénierie

Michał dirige la fonction d’ingénierie de SmartRecruiters et est responsable du développement de logiciels, de l’infrastructure et de la sécurité.

Michał a passé les 15 dernières années à construire des systèmes distribués et à gérer des équipes d’ingénieurs dans diverses industries. Il a rejoint SmartRecruiter en 2012 comme l’un des premiers employés et a aidé à faire évoluer la plateforme pour répondre aux besoins de certaines des plus grandes entreprises du monde.

Il est passionné par la création d’organisations d’ingénierie où les équipes sont habilitées à produire des résultats commerciaux.

Michal est titulaire d’une maîtrise en informatique de l’université Jagiellonian.

##### Rebecca Carr

##### Lehua Stonebraker

Senior Vice President, People

##### Thomas DiDesidero

##### Steve Hardy

##### Robert Symons

Vice-président exécutif, Partenariats et développement

##### Michał Nowak

##### Shiran Yaroslavsky

Senior Vice President, Product

##### Alison Bosch

Premier vice-président, Opérations et chef de cabinet

title: Meet the Team | Ashby
text:
Meet the Team | Ashby

## Team

# We're a nimble team of humans working together to do big things.

Ashby is a remote-first company with colleagues working from 24 different countries in North America, South America, Europe, and Asia. We host an annual company-wide gathering, along with individual team meetups each year.

Our 2022 holiday book exchange 🎄

Department

AllLeadershipCustomer SuccessCustomer SupportDataDesignEngineeringMarketingQuality AssuranceSalesFinancePeople and Talent AcquisitionProduct

##### Kaitlyn Crawley

🇺🇸

Engineering

#### Something I'm proud of at Ashby...

I designed and built our HRIS integrations with Rippling and BambooHR. Instead of manually copying data on hired candidates from Ashby to their HRIS, customers can do it with the click of a button!

#### Something I've helped the team with...

I built a script that enabled our team to import our customers' candidate data from CSV files. It's enabled us to work with technology partners and recruiting firms that haven't yet integrated with Ashby.

#### Most surprising thing about Ashby...

The flexibility and breadth of the product was definitely something that surprised me when I joined Ashby. I was impressed by all of the existing capabilities of the product, and I'm excited to help expand and improve on what we've already built!

Show more

##### Benjamin Encz

🇺🇸

Co-founder & CEO

#### Something I'm proud of at Ashby...

I've designed and created some of the early building blocks we use to build new features (think Legos). It's been great to see the team embrace this way of building and watch the building blocks evolve without my help!

#### Something I've helped the team with...

I've built and continue to expand the internal knowledge base of our industry and our customers. It's critical to help the team make independent product and engineering decisions.

#### Most surprising thing about Ashby...

The team has consistently focused on the long term even as I've stepped away

title: How Knauf transformed its global recruitment with Teamtailor
text:
How Knauf transformed its global recruitment with Teamtailor

 

 

26 feb 2026

Klantverhalen

# How Knauf Transformed its Global Recruitment for 43,000 Employees

Bridging tradition and technology: The Global Recruitment team is bringing Knauf’s 90-year history into the digital age

Discover how James Forster, Global Recruitment Lead at Knauf, steered a two-year digital transformation to unify recruitment for 43,500 employees, ultimately driving a 50% increase in applicant volume while bridging the gap between a 90-year legacy and modern talent acquisition.

Aram Winkler

Marketing Manager DACH & BENELUX

Knauf is a global leader in the building materials industry - a 90-year-old, family-owned powerhouse. But as their factories became "smarter" and their sales processes went digital, their recruitment process faced a challenge: it was stuck in a decentralized, manual past.

We spoke with James Forster, Global Recruitment Lead at the Knauf Group People Team, about how he navigated this complex transformation. His goal? To move from a fragmented "black box" of local processes to a unified, "best-in-class" global engine.

## Why Change was needed

Question: How would you describe Knauf’s recruitment philosophy? In an industry as established as yours, how do you balance "tradition" with the need for modern talent acquisition?

James Forster: "Our recruitment philosophy centres on two pillars: we deliver a best-in-class candidate experience—clear, timely communication; transparency, fair, inclusive evaluation; and respectful closure for every applicant. We also equip our people with a robust, data-enabled hiring system that empowers both candidates and colleagues to identify, assess, and secure best-in-class talent, consistently and at scale. Historically one of the last to embrace digitalisation, our sector is now moving quickly. We seek people who are technologically fluent but also thrive within a family-owned, values-led environment. Our process should mirror the o

title: DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Supercharge your recruitment with our integrations

## DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days)

DevITJobs is the only fully transparent UK job board, built by engineers to attract qualified, active tech talent. With over 20,000 monthly visitors, an average of 35 applicants per job, and no time limits on listings, we help you hire efficiently and effectively. Trusted by over 900 UK companies and rated 4.5 out of 5, we promote your roles across social media, newsletters, and tech-focused channels to deliver real results.

If you want your job ad to be published, please send us a short email to hello@devitjobs.uk to purchase the job ad.

At DevITJobs.uk, we understand what matters to you: reaching qualified tech professionals efficiently, without wasting time or budget.

We are the only transparent IT job board in the UK – built by engineers, for engineers – and designed to attract serious applicants who are actively looking. Over 20,000 tech talents visit our site monthly, generating an average of 35 qualified applicants per job offer.

Your job posting stays active until you hire, with promotion across LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and a newsletter to 4,500+ subscribers. Our team also optimizes each listing to ensure maximum visibility and relevance.

We’ve helped over 900 companies, including Metro Bank, UK Home Office, and McLaren, fill more than 2200 positions. Rated 4.5/5.0 on Trustpilot and recognized in other countries: #1 IT job board in Switzerland by Handelszeitung & Statista, we’re a trusted partner for companies that need results.

DevITJobs isn’t just for Developers – we support roles across the IT spectrum: Engineers, System and SAP Admins, Product Managers, QAs, UX/UI Designers, and more.

Let’s help you hire faster and smarter.

Contact: hello@devitjobs.uk Support article: Read more about this package

We’ve helped over 900 companies, including Metro Bank, UK Home Office, and McLaren, fill more than 2200 positions. Rated 4.5/5.0 on Trustpilot and recognized in other countries: #1 IT job board in Switzerland by Handelszeitung & Statista, we’re a trusted partner for companies that need results.

DevITJobs isn’t just for Developers – we support roles across the IT spectrum: Engineers, System and SAP Admins, Product Managers, QAs, UX/UI Designers, and more.

Let’s help you hire faster and smarter.

Contact: hello@devitjobs.uk Support article: Read more about this package

title: SmartRecruiters Expands its Reach in APAC with the Launch of a New Australia Data Center Hosted by AWS | SmartRecruiters
text:
SmartRecruiters Expands its Reach in APAC with the Launch of a New Australia Data Center Hosted by AWS | SmartRecruiters --

# SmartRecruiters Expands its Reach in APAC with the Launch of a New Australia Data Center Hosted by AWS

Palo Alto, California – September 21, 2023 – SmartRecruiters, the industry’s leading All-in-One Hiring Platform, is excited to announce a significant milestone in its global expansion strategy. The company is proud to unveil its latest endeavor – the launch of a state-of-the-art data center in Australia, hosted by Amazon Web Services (AWS). This expansion marks a strategic move to better serve clients in the Asia-Pacific (APAC) region, ensuring greater reliability, scalability, and security for their data needs.

The new Australia data center represents Smartrecruiter commitment to meeting the growing demand for data services in the APAC market. This facility leverages AWS’s cutting-edge infrastructure, offering businesses in the region the opportunity to access advanced cloud computing and data storage solutions while adhering to the highest industry standards for security and compliance.

Key benefits of the new Australia data center include:

Enhanced Data Accessibility: Clients in the APAC region will experience reduced latency and improved data accessibility, resulting in faster response times and a better overall user experience.

Scalability: The new data center allows SmartRecruiters to scale its services seamlessly, accommodating the evolving needs of businesses across various industries.

High-Level Security: Security is a top priority at SmartRecruiters. The Australia data center is equipped with robust security measures to protect clients’ data, including advanced firewalls, encryption, and continuous monitoring.

Compliance: SmartRecruiters ensures that all data center operations are fully compliant with relevant data protection and privacy regulations, providing clients with peace of mind.

Reliability: With redundancy and fa

title: "Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment | Teamtailor
text:
"Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment | Teamtailor

Jan 30, 2026

# "Feeling Like a Winner": How ESTO is Humanizing FinTech Recruitment

Nadezda Muttonen, Regita Kumel, and Triin Kimer, People & Culture Team, ESTO

Discover how Regita Kumel and the ESTO team are proving that lightning-fast recruitment can still feel incredibly personal, creating a 21-day hiring journey where every candidate - hired or not - walks away feeling like a winner.

Aram Winkler

Marketing Manager DACH & Benelux

In the high-stakes world of FinTech, the Baltic company ESTO stands out - not just for its record-breaking revenue growth, but for its approach to the people behind the numbers. Headquartered in Tallinn, ESTO has grown into a 100-person powerhouse by connecting 6,000+ merchants with innovative consumer finance solutions. But as any fast-growth company knows, scaling the business requires scaling the team and culture.

We sat down with Regita Kumel, Talent & Employer Branding Manager at ESTO, to discuss how they moved away from modules that didn't keep up with the companies fast growth, to embrace a recruitment process that is as intuitive and data-driven as the financial products they build.

Talent & Employer Branding Manager, ESTO

## Meet Regita Kumel

Regita is the Talent & Employer Branding Manager at ESTO, bringing a wealth of experience from both HR agencies and in-house roles at high-growth companies. Specializing in the Fintech, e-commerce, and service sectors, she focuses on bridging the gap between strategic recruitment and authentic employer branding.

### The Need for a Centralized Hub

Teamtailor: Before Teamtailor, what were the "growing pains" in your recruitment process?

Regita: We were using a basic recruitment module, but it lacked the centralization we needed. Managers couldn’t independently track their own processes, and we didn’t have a way to build a long-term talent pool. We needed a platform that was flexible and intuitive - s

# Supercharge your recruitment with our integrations

## Remotive

Remotive is the first community-driven remote job board. Make your ad cut through the noise, speak directly to the remote candidates that matter for your role.

Remotive is the first community-driven remote job board. Make your ad cut through the noise, speak directly to the remote candidates that matter for your role. For promotion at no cost, the remotive team curates remote jobs ad-hoc, picking relevant jobs to highlight depending on our audience needs and our editorial schedules. Note that your jobs won't be posted by default, we can only guarantee the publication of paid jobs.

title: Knauf transformeert wereldwijd recruitment met Teamtailor
text:
Knauf transformeert wereldwijd recruitment met Teamtailor

9 apr 2026

# Zo transformeerde Knauf zijn wereldwijde recruitmentproces voor 43.000 medewerkers

Bridging tradition and technology: The Global Recruitment team is bringing Knauf’s 90-year history into the digital age

James Forster, Global Recruitment Lead bij Knauf, heeft laten zien hoe het moet: digitale transformatie, wereldwijd gestandaardiseerde processen, 43.000 medewerkers – en een toename van 50% in het aantal sollicitaties. Zo verbindt James 90 jaar traditie en moderne werving van talent.

Aram Winkler

Marketing Manager DACH & BENELUX

Knauf is een wereldwijde marktleider in de bouwmaterialenindustrie – een 90 jaar oud familiebedrijf met een indrukwekkende reputatie. Maar naarmate hun fabrieken ‘slimmer’ werden en hun verkoopprocessen werden gedigitaliseerd, liep hun recruitmentproces tegen zijn grenzen aan: deze bleef hangen in een gedecentraliseerd, handmatig systeem uit het verleden.

We spraken met James Forster, Global Recruitment Lead bij het People Team van de Knauf Group, over hoe hij deze complexe transformatie heeft aangepakt. Zijn doel? Om de overstap te maken van een gefragmenteerde ‘black box’ van lokale processen naar een geïntegreerd, best-in-class wereldwijd platform.

## Waarom was verandering nodig?

Vraag: Hoe zou je de recruitmentfilosofie van Knauf omschrijven? Hoe vind je in een sector die al zo lang bestaat als de jouwe een evenwicht tussen traditie en de behoefte aan moderne personeelswerving?

James Forster: "Onze recruitmentfilosofie rust op twee pijlers: we bieden sollicitanten een optimale ervaring – duidelijke, tijdige communicatie; transparantie, een eerlijke en inclusieve beoordeling; en een respectvolle afronding voor elke sollicitant. Daarnaast stellen wij onze medewerkers een robuust, datagestuurd recruitmentsysteem ter beschikking waarmee zowel kandidaten als collega’s in staat zijn om het beste talent te vinden, te beoordelen en succesvol te bemiddelen – op een
highlights:

title: Bri Fredriksen — Author at Lever | Lever
text:
Bri Fredriksen — Author at Lever | Lever

# Bri Fredriksen

Content & Social Media Manager

Bri Fredriksen believes good content must be two things: worth reading (not just skimming) and worth acting on. At Employ, she develops content that helps teams navigate hiring challenges and focus on what works, what's next, and what's possible. Her approach blends thoughtful storytelling with a practical understanding of how people read, learn, and make decisions.

## Articles by Bri

14 articles published

AI & Technology Future of Recruiting

## From Credentials to Capability: Why Skills-Based Hiring Is Replacing Resumes

In a recent webinar, Employ’s Michelle Stone and Katy Jenkins sat down with Nathan Mondragon (ProboTalent) and Adriana Gamboa (IBM) to unpack this shift—and share what hiring looks like when resumes are no longer recruiters’ most trusted signal.

June 3, 2026

Future of Recruiting Hiring Strategy

## Across the Generational Divide: A Look at What Different Generations Expect from the Hiring Process

Learn what different generations expect from employers today—from flexibility and communication to AI transparency and hiring experience.

May 27, 2026

AI & Technology Future of Recruiting

## What the Rise in AI-Powered Candidate Fraud Really Means for TA Teams

Candidate fraud is evolving fast. Learn how talent leaders are detecting risk, redefining screening, and building trust into modern hiring.

May 11, 2026

## Filtering Out the Fraud: How to Recognize Fake Candidates During the Hiring Process

TL; DR You might be about to hire a fake candidate and not even know it. To help you filter out the fraud, we’ve aggregated the top ten tells you’re talking to a fake candidate, […]

April 17, 2026

TL; DR If your pipeline is growing, why aren’t your hires improving? Here’s the thing: With fewer qualified candidates and lower screen-to-interview rates, the challenge isn’t attracting more a

title: DevITJobs.com - Basic Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
DevITJobs.com - Basic Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Maximera er rekrytering med våra integrationer

## DevITJobs.com - Basic Job Ad (30 Days)

DevITJobs is the only fully transparent US job board, built by engineers to attract qualified, active tech talent. With over 20,000 monthly visitors, an average of 35 applicants per job, and no time limits on listings, we help you hire efficiently and effectively. Trusted by more than 1600 companies and rated 4.5 out of 5, we promote your roles across social media, newsletters, and tech-focused channels to deliver real results.

If you want your job ad to be published, please send us a short email to hello@devitjobs.com to purchase the job ad.

At DevITJobs.com, we understand what matters to you: reaching qualified tech professionals efficiently, without wasting time or budget.

We are the only transparent IT job board in the US – built by engineers, for engineers – and designed to attract serious applicants who are actively looking. Over 20,000 tech talents visit our site monthly, generating an average of 45 qualified applicants per job offer.

Your job posting stays active until you hire, with promotion across LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and a newsletter to 4,500+ subscribers. Our team also optimizes each listing to ensure maximum visibility and relevance.

We’ve helped over 1600 companies fill more than 2200 positions. Rated 4.5/5.0 on Trustpilot and recognized in other countries: #1 IT job board in Switzerland by Handelszeitung & Statista, we’re a trusted partner for companies that need results.

DevITJobs isn’t just for Developers – we support roles across the IT spectrum: Engineers, System and SAP Admins, Product Managers, QAs, UX/UI Designers, and more.

Let’s help you hire faster and smarter.

Contact: hello@devitjobs.com Support article: Read more about this package

title: Tellent Whitepaper: Security, Compliance & Operations
text:
Tellent Whitepaper

Security, Compliance & Operations

With this document, Tellent provides you transparency and clarity on its security, compliance and operations policies that form the foundations of our business and partnerships. Because we know that engaging a service provider is an important business decision and that, like any partnership, it should be built on trust.

In this document, you can expect a general overview of the security measures taken by 
Tellent as an organization and in the Tellent Software as a Service products/modules: 
● KiwiHR by Tellent, a core human resources system 
● Javelo by Tellent, a performance management system 
● Recruitee by Tellent, an applicant tracking system 
● Any other service that provides unified functionality between the above-mentioned 
products/modules. 

For questions, please contact the Tellent via the in-app support chat, or the Security Team directly via: security@tellent.com

Table of Contents 
Compliance 3 
ISO 27001 certification and SOC 2 assurance report 3 
Internal auditing and penetration tests 3 
GDPR 3 
Customer data (including customer personal data) 3 
Application Security 4 
Identity and Role based access 4 
Security of data in transit and encryption 4 
Secure coding 5 
Malware and cross-site-scripting protection 5 
Authentication 5 
E-mail protection 5 
Hosting, technical and physical infrastructure 6 
Protection of Servers and Infrastructure 6 
Multi-tenancy 6 
Logging and Monitoring 6 
Disaster Recovery, Backup, and Redundancy 7 
Hosting providers & data centers 7 
Offices 7 
Organization and Management, Security Policies and Processes 8 
Incident Response 8 
Service level and support 8 
Definitions 8 
Last updated: 14th of November 2024 2 

Compliance, Certifications, and Audit reports

ISO 27001 certification and SOC 2 assurance report 
Tellent: 
- ISO 27001:2022 
- A copy of Tellent’s ISO 27001 certification can be found here. 
- Tellent’s ISO 27001 statement of applicability can be found here.
highlights:
Tellent Whitepaper

Security, Compliance & Operations

With this document, Tellent provides you transparency and clarity on its security, compliance and operations policies that form the foundations of our business and partnerships. Because we know that engaging a service provider is an important business decision and that, like any partnership, it should be built on trust.

In this document, you can expect a general overview of the security measures taken by 
Tellent as an organization and in the Tellent Software as a Service products/modules: 
● KiwiHR by Tellent, a core human resources system 
● Javelo by Tellent, a performance management system 
● Recruitee by Tellent, an applicant tracking system 
● Any other service that provides unified functionality between the above-mentioned 
products/modules. 

For questions, please contact the Tellent via the in-app support chat, or the Security Team directly via: security@tellent.com

Table of Contents 
Compliance 3 
ISO 27001 certification and SOC 2 assurance report 3

GDPR 3

Application Security 4

Security of data in transit and encryption 4

Authentication 5

Multi-tenancy 6 
Logging and Monitoring 6 
Disaster Recovery, Backup, and Redundancy 7

Offices 7

Incident Response 8 
Service level and support 8 
Definitions 8 
Last updated: 14th of November 2024 2

- Tellent’s ISO 27001 statement of applicability can be found here.

title: Kandideeri.ee | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
Kandideeri.ee | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Supercharge your recruitment with our integrations

## Kandideeri.ee

Strong visibility in Estonia, growing EU reach, and added value through a wider ecosystem of specialized digital platforms.

Automatically publish jobs to Kandideeri.ee, a recruitment platform with strong visibility in Estonia and growing reach across the EU. Created for employers who value relevant exposure, local market focus, and added visibility through a wider ecosystem of specialized digital platforms.

title: DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor
text:
DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days) | Integrations | Teamtailor

# Optimiere dein Recruiting mit unseren Integrationen

## DevITJobs.uk - Business Job Ad (30 Days)

DevITJobs is the only fully transparent UK job board, built by engineers to attract qualified, active tech talent. With over 20,000 monthly visitors, an average of 35 applicants per job, and no time limits on listings, we help you hire efficiently and effectively. Trusted by over 900 UK companies and rated 4.5 out of 5, we promote your roles across social media, newsletters, and tech-focused channels to deliver real results.

If you want your job ad to be published, please send us a short email to hello@devitjobs.uk to purchase the job ad.

At DevITJobs.uk, we understand what matters to you: reaching qualified tech professionals efficiently, without wasting time or budget.

We are the only transparent IT job board in the UK – built by engineers, for engineers – and designed to attract serious applicants who are actively looking. Over 20,000 tech talents visit our site monthly, generating an average of 35 qualified applicants per job offer.

Your job posting stays active until you hire, with promotion across LinkedIn, Facebook, Twitter, and a newsletter to 4,500+ subscribers. Our team also optimizes each listing to ensure maximum visibility and relevance.

We’ve helped over 900 companies, including Metro Bank, UK Home Office, and McLaren, fill more than 2200 positions. Rated 4.5/5.0 on Trustpilot and recognized in other countries: #1 IT job board in Switzerland by Handelszeitung & Statista, we’re a trusted partner for companies that need results.

DevITJobs isn’t just for Developers – we support roles across the IT spectrum: Engineers, System and SAP Admins, Product Managers, QAs, UX/UI Designers, and more.

Let’s help you hire faster and smarter.

Contact: hello@devitjobs.uk Support article: Read more about this package
